subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-11-15 in New York
subcodes.first_line: Man explains things in two ways. One explanation originates from his personal feelings... In Jerusalem every now and then they broadcast a promise
subcodes.first_line_orig: بیان انسان دو قسم است یکی بیانی است که فقط منبعث از احساسات شخصی و خیال و فهم اوست این برای همه حجت و میزان نیست
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @predictions and prophecies, @unity; oneness of humanity
